title: Agent Harness explained in 8min..
summary: Caleb Writes Code presents agent harness engineering as an evolving discipline that extends beyond prompt and context engineering to better control agentic systems. The video traces the progression from prompt engineering through context engineering and harness engineering, addressing limitations and architectural considerations of modern agents.
